_note: Frozen benchmark-corpus pins — NOT an npm project, NOT installed, and NOT Renovate-managed (Renovate ignores bench/corpus/**). Each entry pins a package@version; `make gen-bench-corpus` captures that packument into bench/corpus/npm/<pkg>.full.json. The captures are committed, frozen data; refresh is a deliberate, manual re-capture (rerun the script and review the diff), never an automatic bump. The set is substantial, many-version packages spanning medium->heavy (trivial few-version packages stress nothing, so they are excluded). See docs/architecture/performance.md.
